content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

May 9, 2003

Attila Gyenis
Post Office Box 5174
Eureka, CA 95502-5174

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-099

Dear Mr. Gyenis:

Pursuant to our conversation of April 24, 2003, and your follow-up letter regarding Humboldt County Board of Supervisor Roger Rodoni, we are withdrawing your request for review of our previous advice (See Rodoni, Advice Letter No. A-03-043). As we discussed in our telephone conversation, under the provisions of California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you are an authorized representative of Roger Rodoni, for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. I enclose a copy of regulation 18329 for your review. If you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you may file a formal complaint with the Enforcement Division of our agency (a complaint form is also enclosed).

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosures
JWW:jg
